summary: The "Permit" approval flow outlined in [ERC-2612](./eip-2612.md) has proven a very valuable advancement in UX by creating gasless approvals for ERC20 tokens. This EIP extends the pattern to ERC-721 NFTs. This EIP borrows heavily from ERC-2612. This requires a separate EIP due to the difference in structure between ERC-20 and ERC-721 tokens. While ERC-20 permits use value (the amount of the ERC-20 token being approved) and a nonce based on the owner's address, ERC-721 permits focus on the `tokenId` of the NFT and increment nonce based on the transfers of the NFT.
title: Permit for ERC-721 NFTs
